name: threadsmith
description: Workflow-first control deck for supervising AI coding projects.

scripts.verify:launchers: zsh -n ./Launch-Threadsmith.command && zsh -n ./Open-Threadsmith-App.command && THREADSMITH_DRY_RUN=1 THREADSMITH_SKIP_OPEN=1 zsh ./Launch-Threadsmith.command >/dev/null && THREADSMITH_DRY_RUN=1 THREADSMITH_SKIP_OPEN=1 zsh ./Open-Threadsmith-App.command >/dev/null
scripts.verify:autopilot: npm run test --workspace @threadsmith/orchestrator && npm run test --workspace @threadsmith/runtime && npm run test --workspace @threadsmith/control-deck -- src/test/renderDeck.workflow.test.tsx && npm run test:e2e:autopilot && npm run smoke:autopilot
scripts.verify:release: npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e && npm run smoke:autopilot && npm run verify:launchers
scripts.verify:bridge: npm run test --workspace @threadsmith/orchestrator && npm run test:e2e:bridge
